default_binding.FAREWELL: a final message queued to erase itself
default_binding.A2_DETAIL1: a thin cable running toward the ridge
default_binding.B1_GATE: a peeled-back gap in the fence
default_binding.C1_FIND3: a ribboned bundle of unsent letters
default_binding.C2_DETAIL1: a wall of pinned tuning notes
default_binding.D1_FRAGMENT: a recurring plea to keep the channel open
default_binding.D2_METHOD2: mapping the pattern onto a calendar
default_binding.E2_DETAIL: what the operator gave up long ago
default_binding.F_METHOD1: digging into the operator's family records
default_binding.F_METHOD2: testing whether the initial names a place instead
default_binding.F1_LEAD2: a local relative listed as next of kin
default_binding.G_METHOD1: extrapolating the loop straight to zero
default_binding.G_METHOD2: testing the countdown against the tide and weather
default_binding.H1_ZONE: the flooded yard beyond the fence
default_binding.H1_GATE: the wind fighting her at the yard's edge
default_binding.H1_ARCHIVE: the whole waiting archive of logs
default_binding.I1_ACTION1: boosting the loop and calling the listener's name
default_binding.I1_ACTION2: pushing the old rig past its limits
default_binding.I2_LEAD: a strong signal report from two ridges west
default_binding.J2_HELPER: the retired colleague across the bay

slots.meaning: The teen protagonist.
slots.guidance: A resourceful teen investigator; capable, curious, not reckless.

slots.meaning: The hero's deceased relative whose equipment and notes anchor the mystery.
slots.guidance: A beloved family elder, no longer living; never a source of peril; papers and gear are the practical toolkit.

slots.meaning: The long-time broadcaster who has kept the signal alive.
slots.guidance: An isolated, devoted older adult; sympathetic, not sinister; his vigil is the emotional core.

slots.meaning: The estranged family member the signal has been trying to reach.
slots.guidance: The operator's long-lost relative; the reunion, not the searching, is the emotional payoff.

slots.meaning: The recurring mysterious broadcast that hooks the hero.
slots.guidance: A looping radio transmission (numbers plus a tone); eerie but not menacing; wonder over dread.

slots.meaning: The ambient background hiss the signal emerges from.
slots.guidance: Ordinary interference or silence, not sinister on its own.

slots.meaning: The audible sign that the countdown is real and running out.
slots.guidance: A steady, escalating cue (shrinking intervals, a descending tone); fair warning, not sudden peril.

slots.meaning: The real-world thing running out that the countdown measures.
slots.guidance: A survivable ending point (equipment failing); consequences are lost chances, not harm.

slots.meaning: The one-time farewell transmission queued to fire and erase when the countdown ends.
slots.guidance: A recorded goodbye, not a threat; the emotional target of the climax.

slots.meaning: The bounded outdoor site where the signal originates and the climax unfolds.
slots.guidance: A weather-exposed, semi-abandoned installation; unsettling atmosphere, not actual danger.

slots.meaning: The short broadcast identifier stamped on equipment and records tied to the signal.
slots.guidance: A brief code (letters/numbers), used as a label, not a name.

slots.meaning: The numeric clue thread pursued in the coordinates route.
slots.guidance: A string of figures within the signal that resolves to real locations.

slots.meaning: The inherited record the hero searches in the logbook route.
slots.guidance: A journal/correspondence archive kept by the hero's deceased relative.

slots.meaning: The harbor sub-route's destination.
slots.guidance: A quiet working waterfront at night; safe to explore.

slots.meaning: First location choice in the harbor.
slots.guidance: A lit, occupied building.

slots.meaning: Second location choice in the harbor.
slots.guidance: A disused monitoring shed.

slots.meaning: A minor fixture at the harbor worth checking.
slots.guidance: An ordinary public noticeboard.

slots.meaning: The clue object found at the harbor landmark.
slots.guidance: A small pinned note naming a frequency.

slots.meaning: The local adult the hero can ask at the harbor.
slots.guidance: A friendly, knowledgeable local; no threat.

slots.meaning: The receiving device found in the harbor shed.
slots.guidance: An old but harmless piece of equipment.

slots.meaning: The tower sub-route's destination.
slots.guidance: A tall disused structure; climbable, not derelict-dangerous.

slots.meaning: First path choice at the tower.
slots.guidance: A fixed maintenance ladder.

slots.meaning: Second path choice at the tower.
slots.guidance: A locked equipment box at ground level.

slots.meaning: The cable or line spotted from the tower top.
slots.guidance: A physical trace leading toward the threshold.

slots.meaning: The marked trail found at the tower base.
slots.guidance: A faded directional marker.

slots.meaning: The coast-path sub-route.
slots.guidance: An exposed but passable clifftop path.

slots.meaning: The commit-or-turn-back obstacle on the coast path.
slots.guidance: A tight, windy squeeze; retreat is always safe, just costs the chance.

slots.meaning: The signage seen after entering the compound.
slots.guidance: An old, weathered sign.

slots.meaning: The sensory cue that someone is still inside.
slots.guidance: A faint, benign light.

slots.meaning: The service-lane sub-route.
slots.guidance: A sheltered but partly flooded access lane.

slots.meaning: First location choice in the service lane.
slots.guidance: A warm, recently occupied building.

slots.meaning: Second location choice in the service lane.
slots.guidance: A humming utility structure.

slots.meaning: Third location choice in the service lane.
slots.guidance: A partly flooded low entrance.

slots.meaning: The commit-or-retreat obstacle in the flooded entrance.
slots.guidance: Rising water; retreating before it climbs higher is always safe.

slots.meaning: The keepsake note found in the flooded entrance.
slots.guidance: A short, weatherproofed note.

slots.meaning: The handwritten log kept at the first building.
slots.guidance: A patient, decades-long written record.

slots.meaning: The sudden sound that pressures the hero at the first building.
slots.guidance: A startling but harmless noise.

slots.meaning: The label naming a past worker at the second structure.
slots.guidance: A maintenance sticker or tag.

slots.meaning: The storage container sub-route in the notes route.
slots.guidance: A homely storage container in the house.

slots.meaning: The primary logbook found in the container.
slots.guidance: A worn, handwritten journal.

slots.meaning: The bundle of confirmation cards found in the container.
slots.guidance: A stack of correspondence keepsakes.

slots.meaning: The bundle of unsent letters found in the container.
slots.guidance: Personal, never-mailed correspondence.

slots.meaning: The identifying mark on one confirmation card.
slots.guidance: A short code written by hand.

slots.meaning: The workshop sub-route in the notes route.
slots.guidance: A cluttered but safe hobby workshop.

slots.meaning: The pinned working notes on the workshop wall.
slots.guidance: Handwritten technical notes.

slots.meaning: The accessible choice in the workshop.
slots.guidance: Notes anyone can read freely.

slots.meaning: The locked choice in the workshop.
slots.guidance: A locked storage cabinet.

slots.meaning: First theory for decoding the number string.
slots.guidance: A substitution/reference-based code.

slots.meaning: Second theory for decoding the number string.
slots.guidance: A time-based reading of the numbers.

slots.meaning: The reference text used as the first cipher key.
slots.guidance: A book already owned by the family.

slots.meaning: The reference text used as the second cipher key.
slots.guidance: A second underlined book.

slots.meaning: The recurring decoded phrase.
slots.guidance: A short, aching plea, not a threat.

slots.meaning: First approach to reading the numbers as timestamps.
slots.guidance: Directly timing the pattern.

slots.meaning: Second approach to reading the numbers as timestamps.
slots.guidance: Mapping the pattern onto a calendar.

slots.meaning: The archival research source.
slots.guidance: A public records archive.

slots.meaning: The living-memory research source.
slots.guidance: A friendly local elder who remembers the past.

slots.meaning: The archival document found.
slots.guidance: An old official notice.

slots.meaning: What the living-memory source reveals about the operator's loss.
slots.guidance: An emotional but non-graphic detail.

slots.meaning: First approach to identifying the listener.
slots.guidance: Researching the operator's family.

slots.meaning: Second approach to identifying the listener.
slots.guidance: Testing whether the name is a place, not a person.

slots.meaning: The first family lead.
slots.guidance: A public record naming an estranged relative.

slots.meaning: The second family lead.
slots.guidance: A local relative willing to talk.

slots.meaning: The geographic landmark tested as a false lead.
slots.guidance: A memorial marker with a name on it.

slots.meaning: First approach to pinning the countdown's target.
slots.guidance: Extrapolating the shrinking pattern.

slots.meaning: Second approach to pinning the countdown's target.
slots.guidance: Checking it against weather and tide.

slots.meaning: The weather event reinforcing the deadline.
slots.guidance: An approaching storm; a survivable inconvenience, not a threat.

slots.meaning: The barrier at the station's main entrance.
slots.guidance: A locked gate; passable via two other routes.

slots.meaning: The yard reached via the fence route.
slots.guidance: A flooded but crossable open yard.

slots.meaning: The commit-or-hesitate obstacle at the yard's edge.
slots.guidance: Strong wind; hesitating costs the moment but causes no harm.

slots.meaning: The station's control room.
slots.guidance: A cluttered but safe equipment room.

slots.meaning: The transmitting tool in the control room.
slots.guidance: A microphone.

slots.meaning: The listener's contact information found on the desk.
slots.guidance: A circled phone number.

slots.meaning: The full archive of the operator's records.
slots.guidance: Decades of logs and messages.

slots.meaning: The route reached via the service road.
slots.guidance: A longer but sheltered access road.

slots.meaning: The commit-or-wait obstacle at the back door.
slots.guidance: A locked door; waiting is safe but costs time.

slots.meaning: The local volunteer group that can help spread the message.
slots.guidance: A friendly hobbyist radio club.

slots.meaning: First rebroadcast action available at the home rig.
slots.guidance: Boosting the signal and naming the listener.

slots.meaning: Second rebroadcast action available at the home rig.
slots.guidance: Pushing old equipment past its safe limits.

slots.meaning: The volunteer who answers the club emergency line.
slots.guidance: A drowsy but helpful volunteer.

slots.meaning: The promising report that comes back over the club net.
slots.guidance: A strong signal report from a nearby town.

slots.meaning: First outside-help option.
slots.guidance: An official coastal safety service.

slots.meaning: Second outside-help option.
slots.guidance: A retired colleague of the operator.

slots.meaning: The official who takes the hero's call.
slots.guidance: A dutiful safety officer.

slots.meaning: The operator's old colleague.
slots.guidance: A retired, knowledgeable former coworker.

slots.meaning: Ending title: reaching the listener directly by phone (success).
slots.guidance: Positive; a warm reunion by voice.

slots.meaning: Ending title: preserving the whole archive (completion).
slots.guidance: Positive; nothing meaningful is lost.

slots.meaning: Ending title: stabilizing the station (completion).
slots.guidance: Positive; the crisis is bought time and handed on safely.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the operator transmits live himself (success).
slots.guidance: Positive; the operator finds the courage to speak.

slots.meaning: Ending title: a live voice answers the rebroadcast (success).
slots.guidance: Positive; direct human contact.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the message is carried onward by a stranger (completion).
slots.guidance: Positive; hope passed to others.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the listener is found via the radio net (success).
slots.guidance: Positive; a located, living relative.

slots.meaning: Ending title: every lead handed to the club (completion).
slots.guidance: Positive; the search continues in good hands.

slots.meaning: Ending title: an official crew reunites the family (success).
slots.guidance: Positive; professional help closes the loop.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the station is secured before the storm (completion).
slots.guidance: Positive; the site and search are both safe.

slots.meaning: Ending title: the old colleague and hero finish together (success).
slots.guidance: Positive; a shared human moment.
